---
name: Content proposal
about: Suggest an article, translation, FAQ, or resource for the site.
title: '[Content] '
labels: ['content', 'needs-review']
assignees: []
---

## What would you like to add or change?

Title, topic, or rough outline.

## Why does it matter?

Who is this for, and what question does it answer?

## Sources & references

Qur'ān verses, hadith, scholarly works, or other trustworthy sources that
ground the content.

## Tone & audience

Intended reader (new to Islam, curious seeker, Muslim revert, etc.) and any
notes on tone.

## Draft (optional)

If you have a draft, paste it here or link to it.
